          "id": "46fb55c3-8278-4a07-89bb-1abc2415010f",
          "message": "Release highlights:\n\n  - [Theme] Developers can now use the shopify theme metafields pull command to download metafields, which can then be used for more refined code completion.\n  - [App] All function builds are now optimized with wasm-opt by default. This can be disabled with wasm_opt = false in [extensions.build].",

        "id": "ac592e17-91e6-4a91-8ce0-7831d92946ca",
        "message": "Release highlights:\n\n  - [Theme] Added `theme profile` command which allows users to get a performance profile for Liquid rendering on a given page\n  - [Theme] Improved storefront password protection checks\n  - [App] Simplified the localization file size validations\n  - [App] App info received a facelift and a few display bugs were fixed",

        "id": "063e4905-ddb8-4b3e-b1dd-8586caf426b9",
        "message": "Release highlights:\n\n  - [CLI] Replace rainbow bar with moving hill for no-color mode\n  - [App] Save `dev_store_url` under `./shopify`\n  - [App] Enable include_config_on_deploy by default for new apps\n  - [Theme] Update `shopify theme push -x` documentation (it uploads, doesn't download)\n  - [Theme] Fix local dev proxy for checkout and accounts/logout\n  - [Theme] Add support to the theme access app staging",
        "type": "info",

        "message": "Release highlights:\n\n  - HTTP proxy support via environment variables\n  - [App] Fixed the first import in shopify.d.ts to be a relative path\n  - [Theme] Fixed Section Rendering API requests containing the same search param name multiple times\n  - [Theme] Fixed an issue in applying the SHOPIFY_FLAG_ENVIRONMENT flag\n  - Other bug fixes and improvements",

        "title": "Release notes for 3.80.0",
        "frequency": "once",
        "message": "Release highlights:\n\n  - [App] Expose new `--use-localhost` and `--localhost-port` flags for the app dev command\n  - [Theme] Support hot-reloading for {% javascript %} tags\n  - [Theme] Support hot reloading after changes to Liquid {% stylesheet %} tag\n  - [Theme] Resolve hot-reloading issue with compiled assets\n  - [Theme] Increase network timeout for theme API requests to prevent failures during long operations",
        "minVersion": "3.80.0",

        "message": "Release highlights:\n\n  - [App] Authentication is now NOT required for `app build` and `app function build`\n  - [Theme] Fix bug where `theme dev` doesn't sync images\n  - [Theme] Added `--path` flag to all theme commands\n  - [Theme] Fix issues with env var SHOPIFY_FLAG_ENVIRONMENT not working correctly",

      {
        "id": "5727cb46-97ad-48bf-95dc-4c317bec09e5",
        "type": "info",
        "title": "🔜 The Next-gen Dev Platform is coming soon",
        "frequency": "once_a_day",
        "message": "To keep building and updating after your apps are migrated to the new platform, you’ll need to `deploy` with Shopify CLI version 3.84 or higher.\n\nUpgrade your CLI now to stay ready:\n\n`npm install -g  @shopify/cli@latest`",
        "cta": {
          "label": "Find out what's coming in the Next-gen Dev Platform",

      {
        "id": "37abf594-236e-43b6-ba79-70b9b39834aa",
        "type": "info",
        "title": "Release notes for 3.85.0",
        "frequency": "once",
        "message": "Release highlights:\n\n  - [App] Multi-session support: you can now run shopify auth login to add additional accounts and easily switch between them\n  - [Theme] Multiple environment support: theme push, pull, share, check, publish, and delete commands can be called with multiple environments; commands use the correct store URL and user-provided flag values override defaults; commands that don't require authentication won't create sessions when run with multiple environments",
        "minVersion": "3.85.0",
        "maxVersion": "3.85.2",
        "ownerChannel": "#devtools-dev-experience",
        "cta": {
          "label": "Read the complete release notes",
          "url": "https://github.com/Shopify/cli/releases/tag/3.85.0"
        }
      },

        "id": "0f62032c-af9b-45a2-b6c8-70d82e244e98",
        "message": "Release highlights:\n\n  - [App] Watch all imported files on app dev\n  - [App] Add a `function info` command to display function information\n  - [Theme] Add ability to notify user when Liquid files are rewritten remotely\n  - [Theme] Editor shortcut (e) will now navigate to your most recently viewed template",
        "type": "info",

        "id": "798a7631-aca3-4e13-93a5-6f93dfb72eae",
        "message": "Release highlights:\n\n  - [App] Added CLI support for extensions.supported_features in toml\n  - [App] Enable custom headers in CLI GraphiQL. Users can now set custom headers like Shopify-Search-Query-Debug=1 in the GraphiQL interface to pass debugging headers to the Admin API\n  - [Theme] Fix shopify theme dev --theme-editor-sync to avoid deleting files during race conditions, especially when multiple changes come from an external process (e.g., AI coding tools)",
